title: Enterprise AI SaaS Mobile App — Full Stack

requirements.text: Create a Motoko backend actor that manages multi-tenant workspaces. Each workspace has an ID, name, and owner. Users are associated with a workspace and have a role: admin, company, or user. Store users with email, hashed password, role, and workspaceId. Expose functions: registerUser, loginUser (returns a session token), getMe.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can register with email, password, and role
Login returns a session token tied to the user and workspace
Role-based access is enforced per operation

requirements.text: Implement project management in the Motoko backend. Projects have id, name, clientId, status (pending/active/completed), and workspaceId. Expose createProject (admin/company only) and listProjects (all authenticated users, scoped to their workspace).
acceptanceCriteria: Admin and company roles can create projects
Projects are isolated per workspace
listProjects returns only projects belonging to the caller's workspace

requirements.text: Implement lead management in the Motoko backend. Leads have id, name, phone, source, status (new/contacted/converted), and workspaceId. Expose createLead and listLeads scoped to the caller's workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Any authenticated user can capture a lead
Leads are isolated per workspace
listLeads returns only leads belonging to the caller's workspace

requirements.text: Implement a social media post scheduling engine in the Motoko backend. Scheduled posts have id, platform (Instagram/Facebook/LinkedIn), content, scheduledAt timestamp, status (pending/sent), and workspaceId. Expose schedulePost (admin only) and listScheduledPosts scoped to workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Only admins can schedule posts
Scheduled posts are listed per workspace
Platform field accepts Instagram, Facebook, or LinkedIn

requirements.text: Implement an AI text generation module in the Motoko backend. Expose a generateAIText function that accepts a prompt string and returns a simulated AI-generated response string. Require authentication to call this endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: Only authenticated users can call generateAIText
Returns a non-empty response string for any prompt
Prompt and response are logged per workspace

requirements.text: Implement an image/vision analysis module in the Motoko backend. Expose analyzeImage that accepts a base64-encoded image string and returns a simulated analysis result. Require authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: Only authenticated users can call analyzeImage
Returns an analysis result object with a description field
Analysis records are stored per workspace

requirements.text: Implement an admin dashboard analytics function in the Motoko backend. Expose getDashboardStats (admin only) that returns totalProjects, totalLeads, totalScheduledPosts, and totalAIGenerations scoped to the caller's workspace.
acceptanceCriteria: Only admin role can access dashboard stats
All counts are scoped to the admin's workspace
Returns accurate counts reflecting current data

requirements.text: Build a mobile-first React frontend with a bottom navigation bar. Screens: Login/Register, Dashboard, Projects, Leads, Post Scheduler, AI Generator, Vision Analyzer. Use a sleek dark-mode enterprise theme with deep charcoal backgrounds, electric teal accents, and clean sans-serif typography. Apply consistent card-based layouts with subtle shadows and rounded corners throughout.
acceptanceCriteria: App is responsive and optimized for mobile screen sizes
Bottom navigation gives access to all main screens
Dark mode is applied consistently across all screens
Visual theme (teal accent, charcoal background) is consistent

requirements.text: Build a Login and Register screen. Show email, password, role selector (admin/company/user), and workspace ID fields. On success, persist the session token in local state and redirect to the Dashboard. Show validation errors inline.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can register with all required fields
Users can log in and are redirected to Dashboard on success
Errors are shown inline without page reload
Session token is stored and used for subsequent API calls

requirements.text: Build an Admin Dashboard screen that fetches and displays stat cards: Total Projects, Total Leads, Total Scheduled Posts, Total AI Generations. Use large numbers with icon indicators. Only visible to admin role.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows 4 stat cards with accurate counts
Non-admin users see an access denied message
Data is fetched on mount using React Query

requirements.text: Build a Projects screen with a list of workspace projects displayed as cards (name, status badge, client ID). Include a floating action button that opens a form to create a new project (name, clientId fields). Only admin and company roles can see the create button.
acceptanceCriteria: Projects are listed as cards with status badge color-coded by status
Create form validates required fields before submitting
New project appears in list after creation without full reload

requirements.text: Build a Leads screen with a list of workspace leads displayed as cards (name, phone, source, status badge). Include a form to capture a new lead (name, phone, source fields). All authenticated users can add leads.
acceptanceCriteria: Leads are listed as mobile-friendly cards
Capture form is accessible to all authenticated users
New lead appears in list immediately after submission

requirements.text: Build a Post Scheduler screen where admins can compose a post (platform selector: Instagram/Facebook/LinkedIn, content textarea, scheduled date-time picker) and submit to schedule it. List all scheduled posts in a card view with platform badge and status.
acceptanceCriteria: Platform selector offers exactly three options
Schedule form validates all fields before submitting
Scheduled posts list updates after new submission
Non-admin users see a read-only view of scheduled posts

requirements.text: Build an AI Generator screen with a large text area for entering a prompt and a Generate button. Display the AI-generated response in a styled result card below. Show a loading spinner while the request is in progress.
acceptanceCriteria: User can type a prompt and tap Generate
Loading spinner is visible during the call
Response is displayed in a readable card after generation

requirements.text: Build a Vision Analyzer screen where users can upload an image from their device. Display a preview of the selected image and an Analyze button. Show the analysis result in a card below after submission. Show a loading state during processing.
acceptanceCriteria: Image file picker opens on tap
Selected image preview is shown before submission
Analysis result card appears after successful call
Loading state is shown while analysis is in progress

requirements.text: Render the generated app logo and splash background as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated.
acceptanceCriteria: Logo image is displayed in the login screen header
Splash background is used on the login/register screen

constraints: All backend logic must remain in a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo
No external databases (PostgreSQL, Redis) — use Motoko stable storage
No Node.js, Express, or server-side JavaScript in the backend
No React Native or mobile framework — build a mobile-first responsive React web app
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
No external AI API integrations (OpenAI, etc.) — simulate AI responses in Motoko
nonGoals: Native iOS or Android app packaging
Actual social media API integration (Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn)
Real AI/ML model inference — responses are simulated

required: Sleek enterprise SaaS logo mark — abstract teal circuit-node symbol on dark background (enterprise-logo.dim_256x256.png)
Dark mobile login screen splash background — deep charcoal with subtle teal geometric grid lines (login-splash.dim_1080x1920.png)
